content:
SIGIL
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: loadUser_refactored
C: missing_id ∧ db.findUser ∧ not_found ∧ audit.log ∧ cache.set
P: missing_id → db.findUser → not_found → audit.log → cache.set
V: db_err->next(err) ∧ minimal_async_await
R: !promisify(db.findUser) ∧ !one_next(err)
A: same_order(missing_id_before_db, not_found_before_audit) ∧ async_await
